payload.label: table lamp
payload.short_description: cream tapered lampshade, turned wooden base
payload.long_description: Off-white/tan tapered fabric lampshade with dark top and bottom trim sitting on a carved, turned dark-wood base with a brass/bronze accent; lamp is mostly visible but the lower base is slightly cropped by the image edge — estimated distance ~0.8 m from the camera.
